events.content: "Evidence": "markdownlint-cli2 v0.22.1 ran via pre-commit hook on every staged commit; the markdown files touched by commits 1bb5395f (specs), 4ed01651 (specs revised), 426e89d3 (none) reported 0 errors. Hook output line: 'SUCCESS: Markdown files OK.'"

"Evidence": "All tests pass in tests/hooks/test_bot_cascade_warning.py; bash -n .githooks/pre-push clean. (Exact test count intentionally not pinned in narrative evidence; it grows as the contract evolves. See test file for current count.)"
"evidence": "Phase 5c implemented in .githooks/pre-push; all 11 tests pass; commit d8aee7ed"

"evidence": "Clustered 15 bot threads by root cause; patched hook (Cluster A: no-fail-open on gh pr view; success+complete gate; explicit exit codes), tests (assert phase_5b_pos>=0; new outcome-token test), spec docs (DESIGN-011 test strategy revised to structural; TASK-011 sections completed). 12/12 tests pass."

"evidence": "Round 2 (6): STEP-0.5 header, docstring AC label, memory count flex, session evidence accuracy. Round 3 (2): reviews pagination, type-validate unresolved_count, PARSE_ERROR sentinel. Round 4 (8): tighten structural tests to non-comment lines, SKIP-reason classification from stderr, bool-subclass guard, removed backtick command-substitution bug in embedded Python, TASK-011 status done. Round 5 (10): further test tightening (warn/skip messages on non-comment lines), purged hard-coded test counts from docs, fixed double-exit-code in unclassified SKIP, REQ-011-02 requirement statement extended to success+complete, bash resolved-path in syntax test. Round 6: self-apply gate caught that gh's --slurp is incompatible with --jq (the round-3 pagination fix was wrong); replaced with --paginate + per-page --jq emitting one timestamp per bot review, then sort/tail in a separate step so $? reflects the gh call. Now PASSes correctly: 'PASS: Bot-cascade check (PR #2011, 0 unresolved, last bot review 1859s old)'. All tests pass; bash -n clean."

lessons: "Evidence": "Created .serena/memories/implementation/implementation-009-req011-tdd-first-shipment.md capturing TDD-first lessons and comment-vs-call grep trap"
"Evidence": "Lessons captured in implementation-009; PR #1989 retrospective referenced as source for Phase 5c contracts"
